definition:
1. like χόλη, gall, bile , (Iliad by Homer) 
2. generally metaphorically bile, gall, bitter anger, wrath , (Homer), attic; χόλος ἔδυ τινά (Iliad by Homer); χόλος ἔμπεσε θυμῷ (Iliad by Homer); χόλον πέσσειν, καταπέσσειν (see. entry); χ. σβέσσαι παῦσαι (Iliad by Homer); χόλου παύεσθαι (Hesiod):—;with genitive objecti, anger towards  or because of  another, (Iliad by Homer); with genitive rei, anger for, because of  a thing, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. an object of anger , [variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
